{{Quote|Hex Deployers, they're loaded to the gills with missiles.|[[Reti]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
The '''Hex Deployer''', also known as a '''Hex deployment vessel''' or a '''Chem Deployer''', was an assault transport used by [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]], and later placed under the command of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Characteristics==
Hex Deployers were large, rounded starships capable of carrying and supporting starfighter escorts like [[Sabaoth starfighter]]s and [[Hex Bomber]]s. Among its defense systems warhead launchers were included allowing the fire of volleys of [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] or missiles modified to include the deadly [[Hex missile|Hex warheads]], weapons crafted on [[Nod Kartha]] loaded with the chemical [[Trihexalon]]. Hex Deployers were also armed with two anti-starfighter laser turrets, to ward off any attackers while dispensing their payload.

==History==
[[File:Hex_Fleet.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Hex fleet over [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]]]
Hex Deployers were sent by Captain [[Cavik Toth]] to destroy an island settlement on [[Maramere]], prior to Toth's pact with [[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku]] a decade after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. The Deployers were destroyed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], with help from [[Reti]] and [[Sol Sixxa]]. Gallia once more fought against Hex Deployers during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], when Toth's Hex fleet launched an assault against the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] fighting on the planet's surface. Gallia was able to destroy the Deployers and their missiles before they breached the atmosphere of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Hex Deployers appear in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''.
